replics: Aglaya: Hi, who are you and why is your car colored and not gray?
Artem: My name is Artem. I don't yet know why a car has a color and the world doesn't. What's your name?
Aglaya: Aglaya, I was an artist and created vibrant paintings for people, bringing them joy.
Artem: It's difficult now; it's probably hard when you can't do what you love.
Aglaya: That's true. Besides, before the flood, I had a fight with a close friend. It's a very difficult memory, and I feel sad when I think about it; I was wrong back then.
